originalTitle: U.S. Treasury Yields Fall But Direction for Long-End Yields Still Seen Upward
summary: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield fell and ING said the the long end of the Treasury curve will continue trading at higher yields even as Trump hasn’t delivered anything to shock markets so far.
content: The 10-year U.S. Treasury yield fell and ING said the the long end of the Treasury curve will continue trading at higher yields even as Trump hasn’t delivered anything to shock markets so far.
chineseTitle: 美国国债收益率下降，但长期收益率仍看上行
chineseSummary: 10年期美国国债收益率下跌，荷兰国际集团表示，尽管特朗普迄今尚未做出任何令市场震惊的举措，但美国国债曲线的长端将继续以更高的收益率交易。
chineseContent: 10年期美国国债收益率下跌，荷兰国际集团表示，尽管特朗普迄今尚未做出任何令市场震惊的举措，但美国国债曲线的长端将继续以更高的收益率交易。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
